title: Museum Cultural Heritage Dashboard Screen AI
sourceTitle: Museum Cultural Heritage Dashboard Screen AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 16:9 museum cultural-heritage visualization dashboard for ancient maritime trade routes, combining modern museum technology with classical artifact elegance. Subject: ancient maritime trade routes drives the central digital-activation showcase, with a 3D rotating treasure artifact, light projection effects, heritage texture detail, and surrounding data modules for map, artifact cards, timeline, visitor flow, story highlights. Scene: Large 4K museum exhibition control screen inspired by a national museum digital display center, elegant and grand, with technology and ancient cultural atmosphere coexisting. Composition: Fixed 16:9 dashboard layout: central 3D artifact activation area, upper-left visitor statistics and heat map, upper-right exhibition schedule and current special exhibition, lower-left restoration progress and collection counts, lower-right education reservations and volunteer status, all organized with clear hierarchy. Signature Elements: Central 3D artifact rotation, ancient maritime trade routes, map, artifact cards, timeline, visitor flow, story highlights, visitor heat map, exhibition schedule, restoration progress, collection statistics, education booking, volunteer status, heritage texture, gold data lines, and 16:9 museum display polish. Style: Modern museum technology UI with refined cultural display design, premium data visualization, artifact texture integration, digital light projection, calm institutional authority, and high-end exhibition-center polish. Color Palette: Deep brown and gold as the main palette, warm white information surfaces, pale cyan restoration-tech accents, dark heritage textures, and restrained luminous data highlights. Lighting: Elegant digital projection lighting around the central artifact, soft gold glow, subtle cyan data light, readable panel contrast, and atmospheric depth without visual clutter. Typography: Short Chinese-style museum UI labels or concise bilingual dashboard labels, clear hierarchy for map, artifact cards, timeline, visitor flow, story highlights, readable metrics, schedule text, restoration status, and visitor information. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
